steps.title: Identify the subject's number
steps.content: The subject is “her book's musings on tenth-century Japanese courtly life.” The noun “musings” is plural, which determines what verb form the sentence requires.

steps.title: Match the verb to the plural subject
steps.content: A plural subject requires a plural verb form in present tense; choice A uses “fascinate,” the correct form. Choices B, C, and D all use singular verb forms, violating subject-verb agreement. That matches choice A — A is correct.
